checks.name: source_graph_is_g60
checks.detail: Canonical source graph id must be AT4val[60,6].

checks.name: projection_declares_g60
checks.detail: Projection must explicitly declare G60 source.

checks.name: edge_labels_derived_from_path
checks.detail: Each edge label must equal from+to from the closed path.

checks.name: triad_of_diads_exact
checks.detail: Triad of diads must be WX,YZ,TI.

checks.name: return_closes_on_IW
checks.detail: The final edge must be IW and must close return to W.

checks.name: no_motion_without_cycle_edge
checks.detail: Motion must be restricted to declared cycle edges.

checks.name: projection_not_canonical_object
checks.detail: Shape must identify itself as a projection, not the canonical object.
